journal.title: Journal
journal.description: Daily log with highlights and gratitude
journal.callout: Write freely — a few honest lines beat a perfect entry. Duplicate this page for each new day.
journal.todaysLogHint: What happened today? How did it make you feel?
journal.highlightBest: The best moment of the day

taskList.title: Task List
taskList.description: Today, this week, and a backlog
taskList.callout: Check items off as you go. Drag tasks between sections when plans change.
taskList.laterPark: Park future ideas here so they are not forgotten
taskList.doneHint: Drag finished tasks here for a satisfying weekly review.

habitTracker.title: Habit Tracker
habitTracker.description: Weekly grid with a built-in review
habitTracker.callout: Mark each cell with a ✓ as you go. Small streaks beat big plans.
habitTracker.reviewEasiest: Which habit was easiest to keep?

readingList.title: Reading List
readingList.description: Now reading, queue, and favorite quotes
readingList.callout: Keep everything you want to read in one place. Move items up as you start them.
readingList.readingNowChild: Where I stopped, and a thought so far
readingList.finishedItem: An example finished read — add a one-line review
readingList.quotesHint: Copy a line that stuck with you

meetingNotes.title: Meeting Notes
meetingNotes.description: Agenda, decisions, and owned action items
meetingNotes.callout: One page per meeting. Give every action item an owner before the meeting ends.
meetingNotes.notesHint: Key points, context, and open discussion
meetingNotes.nextMeetingHint: Date and topics to carry over

oneOnOne.title: 1:1 Notes
oneOnOne.callout: A running page for recurring 1:1s — add a new date heading on top each time.
oneOnOne.theirTopicsHint: What do they want to cover?
oneOnOne.myTopicsHint: What do I want to cover?
oneOnOne.feedbackHint: One thing to keep, one thing to adjust
oneOnOne.growthHint: Longer-term goals — revisit once a month

projectBrief.title: Project Brief
projectBrief.callout: Fill in the one-line summary first. If you can't, the project isn't defined yet.
projectBrief.overviewHint: What are we doing, for whom, and why now?
projectBrief.outScopeHint: Explicitly excluded — this is what prevents scope creep
projectBrief.risksHint: Risk — and how we'll mitigate it

productSpec.title: Product Spec
productSpec.callout: Specs are for alignment, not paperwork — keep every section short enough to read in a minute.
productSpec.problemHint: Who is hurting today, and how do we know?
productSpec.userStoryHint: As a ___, I want ___ so that ___.
productSpec.mustHaveTodo: A requirement the launch blocks on
productSpec.openQuestionsHint: What still needs an answer, and from whom?

decisionLog.title: Decision Log
decisionLog.callout: Write decisions down when they're made — future you will ask why.
decisionLog.contextHint: The situation and constraints at the time
decisionLog.consequencesHint: What this makes easier, and what it makes harder

weeklyPlan.title: Weekly Plan
weeklyPlan.description: Three priorities and a day-by-day schedule
weeklyPlan.callout: Plan on Monday, review on Friday. Three priorities beat ten.

classNotes.title: Class Notes
classNotes.description: Key ideas, vocabulary, and review questions
classNotes.callout: Write questions in your own words while you listen, and review them within a day.
classNotes.keyIdeaMain: The main concept, in my own words
classNotes.keyIdeaConnect: How it connects to what I already know

researchNotes.title: Research Notes
researchNotes.description: Source, quotes, and your own analysis
researchNotes.callout: One page per source. Keep what the source says separate from what you think.
researchNotes.summaryHint: The argument in two or three sentences
researchNotes.quotesHint: Exact words, with the page number
researchNotes.thoughtsAgree: Where I agree or disagree, and why
